title: orchis incarnata subsp. fraasii
intro: Orchis incarnata subsp. fraasii is a subspecies of the orchid plant, specifically a terrestrial orchid native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as possessing anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically harvested and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
